name: fitbit-skill
description: AI agent skill for the Fitbit Web API

settings.name: Fitbit Client ID
settings.description: Your Fitbit App's Client ID from https://dev.fitbit.com/apps

settings.name: Fitbit Client Secret
settings.description: Your Fitbit App's Client Secret from https://dev.fitbit.com/apps

settings.name: Fitbit Redirect URI
settings.description: Your Fitbit App's Redirect URI from https://dev.fitbit.com/apps

settings.name: (Optional) Fitbit Access Token
settings.description: Optional and can be left blank. The extension will set this after you allow it to access your Fitbit data.

settings.name: (Optional) Fitbit Refresh Token
settings.description: Optional and can be left blank. The extension will set this after you allow it to access your Fitbit data.
